items.summary: Update: GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro are now available in the API. Quote OpenAI Developers @OpenAIDevs Apr 24 GPT-5.5 is now available in the API. The model brings higher intelligence and stronger token efficiency to complex work, helping tasks get done with fewer retries. x.com/16338749515087… Today we’re introducing two big steps for health at OpenAI: - ChatGPT for Clinicians, a free version of ChatGPT designed for clinical work - HealthBench Professional, a new benchmark to evaluate real clinician chat tasks We’re excited about what this can unlock for care. ![Image 5: ❤️](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/2764.svg)

items.title: CEO Interview with Xianxin Guo of Lumai
items.summary: Xianxin is the CEO and Co-Founder of Lumai, an Oxford University spin-out pioneering disruptive optical computing technologies for Al and data center acceleration.
